title: Crossopetalum lanceifolium
taxonomy: Crossopetalum lanceifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is native to South America and is also known as the 'Escobilla'. It belongs to the genus Crossopetalum, which contains several species of climbing or scrambling shrubs. The Celastraceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the waxworts or staff vines. Crossopetalum lanceifolium's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its place within the diverse plant kingdom.
